License terms and functions for time manipulation, timezone handling, and time conversions.


## Files
- **[LICENSE](LICENSE.md)**: License terms for redistribution and use of software by egnite Software GmbH.
- **[mktime.c](mktime.c.md)**: Implements a function to convert a `struct tm` to a `time_t` value, handling overflow and time adjustments.
- **[time.c](time.c.md)**: Functions and utilities for time manipulation, including timezone handling, DST adjustments, and conversions between UTC and local time.
- **[time.h](time.h.md)**: Standard time functions and utilities for handling time zones, daylight saving time, and time conversions.
